execution.hintProvisionCommand: Runs when Paperclip prepares this execution workspace
execution.hintTeardownCommand: Runs when the execution workspace is archived or cleaned up
execution.runtimeSourceOverride: This execution workspace currently overrides the project workspace runtime config.
execution.runtimeSourceInherited: This execution workspace is inheriting the project workspace runtime config.
execution.runtimeSourceNone: No runtime config is currently defined on this execution workspace or its project workspace.
execution.hintRuntimeServicesJson: Concrete workspace runtime settings for this execution workspace. Leave this inheriting unless you need a one-off override. If you are missing the right commands, ask your CEO to set them up for you.
execution.noServicesRunning: No runtime services are currently running for this execution workspace.
execution.noRuntimeConfig: No runtime config is defined for this execution workspace yet.
project.notFound: Workspace not found for this project.
project.primaryMessage: This is the project’s primary codebase workspace.
project.hintSetupCommand: Runs when this workspace needs custom bootstrap
project.hintCleanupCommand: Runs before project-level execution workspace teardown
project.hintRuntimeJson: Default runtime services for this workspace. Execution workspaces inherit this config unless they set an override. If you do not know the commands yet, ask your CEO to configure them for you.
project.noServicesRunning: No runtime services are currently running for this workspace.
project.noRuntimeConfig: No runtime-service default is configured for this workspace yet.
workspace_card.will_create_isolated: A fresh isolated workspace will be created when this issue runs.
workspace_card.will_reuse: This issue will reuse an existing workspace when it runs.
workspace_card.will_use_default: This issue will use the project default workspace configuration when it runs.
close_dialog.checking_readiness: Checking whether this workspace is safe to close...
close_dialog.readiness_error: Failed to inspect workspace close readiness.
close_dialog.shared_workspace_hint: This is a shared workspace session. Archiving it removes this session record but keeps the underlying project workspace.
close_dialog.own_checkout_hint: This execution workspace has its own checkout path and can be archived independently.
close_dialog.primary_workspace_hint: This execution workspace currently points at the project's primary workspace path.
close_dialog.disposable_hint: This workspace is disposable and can be archived.
close_dialog.cleanup_failed_hint: Cleanup previously failed on this workspace. Retrying close will rerun the cleanup flow and update the workspace status if it succeeds.
execution.configureHint: Configure the concrete runtime workspace that Paperclip reuses for this issue flow. These settings stay attached to the execution workspace so future runs can keep local paths, repo refs, provisioning, teardown, and runtime-service behavior in sync with the actual workspace being reused.
execution.linkedIssuesHint: Any issue attached to this execution workspace appears here so you can review the full session context before reusing or closing it.
project.configureHint: Configure the concrete workspace Paperclip attaches to this project. These values drive per-workspace checkout behavior, default runtime services for child execution workspaces, and let you override setup or cleanup commands when one workspace needs special handling.
project.sharedServicesHint: Shared services for this project workspace. Execution workspaces inherit this config unless they override it.
